$comment: Vercel PRO config (NOT active). Pro allows up to 40 crons at any frequency, so each job runs on its own schedule — auto-approve and reminders hourly. To switch: upgrade the project to Pro, then copy these crons into vercel.json (replacing the Hobby umbrella) and redeploy. No code change needed; the umbrella route at /api/cron/nightly simply goes unused. See docs/v1-launch-runbook.md.
